summary: GH-95 implementation is approved for PR creation. The package fixture is redacted, keeps raw/runtime/evidence/user data out of Lode, binds normalized fields to placeholder source/evidence refs, and updates manifest/lifecycle refs without implementing validator, post-check, resolver, Core consumption, or write behavior.
reviewed_validation_summary: Local validation passed on 2026-07-01 for `jq empty` over manifest/lifecycle/fixture/Loom JSON, targeted `jq -e` fixture reference checks, `git diff --check`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-95 --json`, and `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-95 --json`; `loom build --target . --item GH-95 --build-evidence .loom/specs/GH-95/build-evidence.json --json` was classified as a Loom build adapter gap after direct suite and carrier validation passed.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Authored implementation review binds to GH-95 implementation head `884811598862b395edae782c7530b9e51d188aa1`; subsequent PR setup changes are limited to review/progress/status carriers and PR metadata, with no package fixture, manifest, lifecycle, schema, validator, post-check, runtime, or external behavior changes.

follow_ups: GH-96 must implement the validator CLI before validator report pass can promote the package.
GH-97 must define post-check output before post-check-backed success can be claimed.
GH-98 must define failure mapping before Core/App category consumption can be claimed.
